title: Profile-guided workflow — pprof shows mallocgc hotspot, skill writes targeted benchmark
benchmark_snippet:
# User provides CPU pprof output showing:
# runtime.mallocgc  45%  45%
# encodeToken        30%  75%
# User asks: 'What benchmark should I write?'
expected_feedback: confirm hotspot from pprof (mallocgc in encodeToken), write BenchmarkEncodeToken with -memprofile flag, note data_basis=pprof profile
